name: Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the cheese is at room temperature.
2. Blend all ingredients together using a mixer or food processor.
3. Line a small bowl with plastic wrap.
4. Transfer the mixed ingredients into the lined bowl.
5. Refrigerate overnight.
6. When ready to use, remove from the mold and take off the plastic wrap.
7. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the cheese ball.
8. Serve with assorted crackers.
